sql_code: SELECT (read_clat_p50_ns + write_clat_p50_ns)/1000 as median_latency_ms, * EXCLUDE (run_id, scenario_name, benchmark_tool, fio_command, fio_job, fio_error, usr_cpu, sys_cpu, ctx, majf, minf)
AND direct = 1 AND fio_size = '10G' AND durability_mode = 'none'
r_code: to_svg <- svgstring(width = output.width.inch, height = output.height.inch, scaling = 1)
### the current table is bound to the variable 'df'
output <- ggplot(df, aes(y = median_latency_ms, x = backend )) +
geom_boxplot() +
stat_summary(fun='median', geom='text', aes(label=round(after_stat(y), digits =2)), vjust=-0.5) +
facet_wrap(~ benchmark_name) +
theme_bw()
plot(output); dev.off(); to_svg() # output to the html page

geom_point() +
stat_summary(fun='median', geom='text', aes(label=round(after_stat(y), digits =2)), vjust=-0.5) +
